name: tracemind-instrumentation
updatePolicy: Check tracemind.agent_guidance before changing TraceMind instrumentation. In multi-project setups, use tracemind.project_info or MCP tool metadata to confirm the project before adding events. Ask the user before updating local skill or instruction files. Ask before calling tracemind.submit_feedback unless the developer explicitly requested submission. Use submitFeedback, query_user_feedback, and update_user_feedback for terminal user feedback workflows.
